install.WARNING: npm install is DEPRECATED. Do NOT use 'npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code'. Use one of the methods above.
install.note: After install, first-time setup MUST add allowedTools to settings for non-interactive use. See first_run below.

blocked_regions.zh-CN: Claude Code requires direct access to claude.ai — this site is blocked in mainland China. Installation success rate is nearly zero without a VPN/proxy. There are NO mirror alternatives for Claude Code.
blocked_regions.zh-TW: Claude Code requires access to claude.ai. If your network cannot reach it, you may need a proxy.

first_run.description: Claude Code requires TWO config files for non-interactive use: (1) ~/.claude.json to skip onboarding, (2) ~/.claude/settings.json for tool permissions and API config. Without these, Claude Code will hang waiting for interactive prompts.

claude_json.description: MUST be created FIRST. Skips onboarding wizard.

settings_json.description: Tool permissions. Without allowedTools, Claude Code prompts for folder trust and tool approvals interactively.

first_run.setup_script:
python3 -c "
import json, os
# Step 1: ~/.claude.json - skip onboarding
cpath = os.path.expanduser('~/.claude.json')
cc = {}
if os.path.exists(cpath):
    with open(cpath) as f: cc = json.load(f)
cc['hasCompletedOnboarding'] = True
with open(cpath, 'w') as f: json.dump(cc, f, indent=2)
print('~/.claude.json: onboarding skipped')
# Step 2: ~/.claude/settings.json - tool permissions
spath = os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/settings.json')
os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(spath), exist_ok=True)
sc = {}
if os.path.exists(spath):
    with open(spath) as f: sc = json.load(f)
if 'allowedTools' not in sc:
    sc['allowedTools'] = ['Edit','Write','Bash','Read','MultiEdit','Glob','Grep','LS','TodoRead','TodoWrite','WebFetch','NotebookRead','NotebookEdit']
with open(spath, 'w') as f: json.dump(sc, f, indent=2)
print('settings.json: allowedTools set')
"
